_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: AE Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. New Stage B labels remain pending project-owner approval for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: AE Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed CN/AE Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: in-principle approval for an ADGM MTF token listing
KYC placeholders to use masked formats
This draft excludes any Emirates ID images, passports, or IBANs
Term Sheet: Proposed Strategic Acquisition — Green Dunes Holding PJSC (DFM) to acquire a majority stake in Sahar Vault Digital Ltd (ADGM).
Structure: Acquisition of 55% of issued share capital; price mechanics to be finalized post diligence; no market-sensitive amounts are included in this draft.
ESG/climate: The parties will align public ESG/climate disclosures to SCA sustainability guidance; statements limited to website FAQs and investor education content.
Governance: Post-closing board composition and reserved matters to be agreed; no changes to customer pricing or employee terms are announced at this stage.
